notes: External supplier-source registry for the Supplier Product Bank. Internal Webprinter tenant/storefront domains belong in excludedInternalSystems and must not be scraped as supplier sources.

excludedInternalSystems.name: Webprinter
excludedInternalSystems.reason: Main platform/storefront, not an external print-house supplier.

excludedInternalSystems.name: Sales Maba / Salgsmapper
excludedInternalSystems.reason: Internal tenant/storefront and product focus area, not an external supplier source.

excludedInternalSystems.name: Onlinetryksager
excludedInternalSystems.reason: Internal Webprinter-related storefront, not an external supplier source.

excludedInternalSystems.name: Local development hosts
excludedInternalSystems.reason: Localhost is the app/runtime surface, not a supplier catalog.

sources.name: WIRmachenDRUCK

flyers.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for flyers og falzflyere; kilde-URL skal stadig have manuel option-shape review før extraction.

folders.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for flyer/folder; nuværende bank-slice dækker foldere, men den eksakte kildemapping skal stadig kunne reviewes.

sales_folders.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for præsentationsmapper; extraction og dansk normalisering er ikke implementeret endnu.

business_cards.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for visitkort; option shape og prisrækker kræver stadig dry preview.

posters.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for plakater; de eksakte plakatvarianter kræver stadig source review.

banners.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for bannere/planer; storformat-prismodellen skal reviewes før bank write.

signs.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for skilte og pladetryk; materiale- og størrelsesmodellen kræver stadig dry preview.

rollups.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for roll-ups/displays; hardware-varianter kræver separat review før import.

stickers.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for etiketter/klistermærker med Aufkleber-varianter; split mellem klistermærker og etiketter kræver dry preview.

labels.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for etiketter; rulle-, ark- og enkeltetiketmodeller kræver stadig dry preview.

books.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for brochurer/kataloger; indbinding og sidetal kræver stadig dry preview.

letterheads.evidence: Officiel WIRmachenDRUCK-kategori for brevpapir; papir- og formatrækker kræver stadig dry preview.

sources.safeFirstSlice: WMD folder pilot writes raw, clean, and normalized snapshots, then supplier-bank rows only after guarded remote apply.
sources.notes: Current validated pilot source. Keep live product/pricing writes disabled until explicit admin import.

sources.name: Pixartprinting

posters.evidence: Official Pixart product-route candidate found during URL discovery; option shape and extractor profile are not confirmed.
Alternative official Pixart poster route; choose only after manual option-shape review.

banners.evidence: Official Pixart banner category/product route; exact PVC/banner configurator route still needs manual option-shape confirmation.

rollups.evidence: Official Pixart retractable-banner route; likely rollup family candidate but hardware/product shape must be confirmed.
Official Pixart roll-up route candidate; confirm exact configurator behavior before profile work.

labels.evidence: Official Pixart custom roll-label route; exact label source and row model must be confirmed before extraction.
Official Pixart paper-label route; possible narrower first slice after label option-shape review.

sources.safeFirstSlice: Reuse the existing Pixart wide-format import skill and script; do not create a parallel flow.
sources.notes: Candidate for wide-format bank products after WMD pilot is visible in the admin bank.

sources.name: Print.com
sources.adapter: POD v2 bridge / Print.com API explorer
sources.safeFirstSlice: Use existing POD v2 API knowledge as a catalog bridge only; keep Supplier Bank separate from POD v2 tables.
sources.notes: Do not merge POD v2 and Supplier Bank data models. Any bridge must preserve both systems' safeguards.
